items.title: Solanki 'would've liked to have gone one step further' but still 'immensely proud' of GT
items.summary: He said sending Nishant Sindhu at No. 3 wasn't a predetermined move, and was taken by head coach Ashish Nehra
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Record-holder Milner retires after 24-year career
items.summary: Former England international James Milner announces his retirement after a 24-year Premier League career.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Kyle Pitts sees the same leadership from President Matt Ryan as when they were teammates
items.summary: The Falcons' tight end and the Falcons' President of Football were teammates in 2021.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
